title: Expanded Froglights
description: Adds new variations of Froglights, as well as new type of blocks.
body:
Requires Fabric API!

This mod adds for each frog 2 new froglight types!
For orange frog: Ruddy, Coralline
For green frog: Celadon, Azure
For white frog: Navy, Violaceous

Also adds froglight lamps, those can be turned off/on on right click.

Those will be craftable, but they unobtainable right now because I haven't added any recipes :P
